content.en:
Demon Seed Abyss.

Ye Tian was familiar with the way when he came in this time, and he naturally wouldn't go to the places he had been to before.

Moreover, his current strength is much stronger than in the past, and his ability to save his life is naturally stronger.

However, if he encounters a top-notch demon seed, he is still not an opponent.

The years passed, and it was a long time to pass.

Ye Tian gradually found a lot of treasure resources in the Demon Seed Abyss that helped to improve the Eternal Dao Body, and then came out again, trading resources with other Eternal Dao Realms to obtain a large number of Nine Pole Points.

Then, continue to purchase resources that will help you improve your Eternal Dao Body.

That's it.

Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Body Transformation gradually improved from the three-in-two realm to the three-in-three, three-in-five realm.

this day.

Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Body Transformation had been raised to the Forty Percent realm, and his strength had improved a lot.

In addition, he also obtained a lot of resources that could help improve his cultivation, and after refining one after another, his cultivation was finally promoted to the middle realm of the Eternal Dao Realm.

If the cultivation is improved, the strength will naturally be improved.

......

The capital of the ancient kingdom.

The dwelling place of the lord of Ogu.

The three Eternal Dao Realms sat together chatting and discussing an important matter.

And this place has been sealed off by the Lord of the Ancient Kingdom, not allowing any Eternal Dao Realm to know about the affairs here.

These three Eternal Dao Realms, in addition to the Ao Gu Country Lord, the other two Eternal Dao Realms are the Tide River Lord and the Blood Eye Dao Lord.

They are all extremely ancient Eternal Dao Realms, and they are all condensed into medium Eternal Dao Species, and they have all raised their Eternal Dao Bodies to the realm of Dacheng or above, and their strength is extremely strong.

"Blood-Eyed Dao Master, have you made any new progress in summoning us this time?"

Lord Ogu asked.

"Lord Agu Country, I naturally have new progress, otherwise I wouldn't have brought the Tide River Lord to you immediately!" The Blood-Eyed Dao Lord said excitedly: "I forced an Eternal Dao Realm resource to try that plan, and the other party successfully seized another Eternal Dao Realm Eternal Dao Seed and successfully transplanted it!"

"Successful transplantation !!!"

Lord Ogu was shocked and excited.

Transplanting the Eternal Dao Seed, this is what the three of them have been doing.

The three of them all had a very big problem with their Eternal Dao Species, and they were not sure about transcending the Eternal Dao Realm, nor did they want to destroy their own Eternal Dao Species.

In order to preserve their strength, they thought of another plan, which was to seize other Eternal Dao Species of the Eternal Dao Realm and replace their own Eternal Dao Species.

However, the two Eternal Dao Seeds must be the same Eternal Dao Species.

For example, the Lord of the Ancient Realm cultivated a medium eternal Dao species, the True Yang Dao Species!

So, he had to take over the other True Yang Dao species!

Once this plan is successful, then you can capture other True Yang Dao Seeds and replace your own True Yang Dao Seeds.

In this way, the problem of the Eternal Dao can be solved, but it cannot be completely solved.

But at least it won't be demonized for a short time, and if there is a problem of demonization in the future, you can change it to a true yang Dao seed.

But.

Conquering the Eternal Dao Seed, this is a forbidden technique, and it has been forbidden to study.

But the three of them had no hope of living, so they naturally didn't care about this problem, so they secretly studied it.

During this period, many of the Eternal Dao Realms who committed crimes were arrested by them and secretly studied.

And in the territory of the Agu Country, it is completely under the management of the Lord of the Ogu Kingdom, and the news naturally did not spread, even if something went wrong, they could kill it.

"Bloody Eye Dao Master, is there any sequelae of the forbidden technique we studied recently?"

Lord Ogu asked.

"There are sequelae!" the Blood-Eyed Dao Lord nodded, "That's why I came to you to discuss, after testing, the Eternal Dao Seed can be captured, as long as the Dao Seed is the same, it can be replaced." However, after the substitution, the expulsion of the Eternal Dao Species is very great, and there is a sudden connection between the Eternal Dao Species and the Eternal Dao Body, it will be difficult for us to control the Eternal Dao Body, and for a long time, our strength will not be able to exert ourselves, or even show our faces, otherwise it will be easy to be exposed. "

"Exclusiveness, there is a way to solve it!"

The main road of the country of Oku.

"Eternal Soul Eater!"

They spoke in unison.

And this is something that only the Lord of the Agu Kingdom can do.

"The Eternal Soul Eater Technique needs to devour ten thousand bodies of the Eternal Dao Realm, and it can devour all kinds of alien powers, and there was once an Eternal Dao Realm who used the Eternal Soul Eater Technique to master the power of the demon seed, and from the destruction of a top force, and was not rejected by the power of the demon seed at all, and even for a period of time, he still had reason. It's just that after a long time, his own will can't compete with the power of the demon seed, and he was finally transformed by the demon seed!"

"This happened in my ancient realm, so the Eternal Soul Eater was also obtained by me. "

The main road of the country of Oku.

"Yes, and the Ancient Realm Lord, only you can provide 10,000 Eternal Supreme Dao Realms, we can't gather so many Eternal Supreme Dao Realms!" said the Blood-Eyed Dao Lord.

However.

At this time, the Augu Kingdom Lord frowned: "You should know that ten thousand Eternal Dao Realms are not a small number, once so many Eternal Dao Realms are killed by me, the news will definitely leak out." In the Augai Realm, there are still some Eternal Dao Realms who are members of the Nine Extremes Alliance, and some of the existence in the Nine Extremes Alliance even I dare not provoke! Moreover, 10,000 Eternal Dao Realms are only enough for one of us to devour, and a total of 30,000 Eternal Dao Realms are needed, so how many great forces will have to be destroyed? In the entire Aug Kingdom, the number of Eternal Dao Realms is only about 100,000. "

"Lord Agu Country, this is also something that can't be helped!" The Blood-Eyed Dao Lord said helplessly: "We must do this, otherwise it won't be long before you may become immortal to Dao." Even if you keep collecting Liuhu Gold, the effect of Liuhu Gold is getting worse and worse, how many billions can you still hold on to the Dao Era? One billion, or ten billion? What is the significance of this time for us?"

"Blood-Eyed Dao Master, this matter must be done, but what can be done so that we are not exposed, this is the most important thing, once exposed, not only will I fall, but you will not survive!"

At this time, the main channel of the tide river said: "I have a note, that is, let the demon seed abyss be exposed, and let them break the third defense circle, once some demon seeds enter the ancient realm, we will take the opportunity to catch 30,000 eternal to the Dao realm, and then we can shirk the killing of the demon seed." It is normal for the demon seed to be in turmoil and destroy one or two kingdoms, but what is it that only 30,000 eternal realms are in the Dao realm? "

This plan is very ruthless, when the time comes, not only will the 30,000 Eternal Dao Realm be killed by them, but countless Eternal Dao powerhouses and mythical Dao Realm powerhouses will be killed by the demon seeds.
